query:
-- Fix life_domain_scores table
ALTER TABLE life_domain_scores 
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS notes TEXT,
MODIFY score FLOAT NOT NULL,
MODIFY recordedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP;

-- Fix habits table
ALTER TABLE habits 
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS emoji VARCHAR(8) DEFAULT '✨',
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS targetFrequency ENUM('daily', 'weekly') DEFAULT 'daily',
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS isActive BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE;

-- Fix habit_completions table
ALTER TABLE habit_completions 
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS userId INT NOT NULL;

-- Fix daily_check_ins table
ALTER TABLE daily_check_ins 
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS gratitude TEXT,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS completedHabitIds JSON DEFAULT '[]',
MODIFY mood INT NOT NULL,
MODIFY energy INT NOT NULL,
MODIFY stress INT NOT NULL;

-- Fix journal_entries table
ALTER TABLE journal_entries 
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS moodTag VARCHAR(50),
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS themes JSON DEFAULT '[]';

-- Fix weekly_insights table
ALTER TABLE weekly_insights 
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS insightText LONGTEXT NOT NULL,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS growthScore FLOAT DEFAULT 0,
MODIFY weekStart TIMESTAMP NOT NULL;

-- Fix growth_milestones table
ALTER TABLE growth_milestones 
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS domain ENUM('mindset', 'relationships', 'work', 'health', 'spirituality', 'finances', 'overall') DEFAULT 'overall',
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS emoji VARCHAR(8) DEFAULT '🌱',
MODIFY achievedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP;
